title: scabiosa atropurpurea subsp. maritima
intro: Scabiosa atropurpurea subsp. maritima, also known as the coastal pincushion flower, is a perennial plant species within the Scabiosa genus. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Scabiosa atropurpurea subsp. maritima include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and support digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
